title: Test
description:
🧟 We're live and ready to survive together—this is your alliance command center.

☠️ Every message from leadership is built for YOU, our warriors, delivered sharp and clear.

🏆 Let's prove what this family can do when we fight as ONE.
author: TJ | R4

title: AFK
description:
☠️ Going dark? Let us know—we won't boot you from the family if you give us a heads up.

🚛 Just post here before you go offline for an extended stretch.

🛡️ Keep our alliance strong by keeping us in the loop—simple as that.

⚔️ Stay connected, stay loyal, SPEAK UP.
author: TJ | R4

title: BGB
description:
⚔️ BLACK GOLD BATTLEFIELD is our most CRUCIAL tactical showdown — alliance vs alliance for glory and dominance across the wasteland.

🎯 REGISTRATION & PREP: Only R4/R5-selected starters and substitutes can fight. Get ALL troops home and EMPTY your hospital before battle begins.

📡 TEAM ASSIGNMENTS: Check the events tab NOW to find out if you're Team A or Team B — know your squad.

🏗️ PART 2 IS CONTROL: Military, Hospitals, Oil Refineries and Oil Tanks are our PRIORITY targets. Hold the buildings, hold the points.

☣️ RARE EARTH ALLOYS (Golden Balls) drop TWICE — at the 15 minute mark and the 35 minute mark. Position your warriors early or lose game-changers.

🔥 FIGHT WITHOUT FEAR: All units heal FREE when you leave the map — losses are reversed, so commit HARD. Cooldown to re-enter is 10 minutes, plan accordingly.

☠️ Our leaders will brief final strategy before kickoff — trust the plan, trust your family.

💪 This is OUR moment. Dominate the battlefield.
author: TJ | R4

title: Territory War
description:
🎯 TERRITORY WAR kicks off in 28 minutes — get online NOW and lock in your truck position.

🗺️ The city is marked and waiting for us to claim it.

⚔️ This is OUR moment to dominate the wasteland and show what this alliance is made of.

🚛 Prestage your convoy, warriors — we move as ONE.

🏆 LET'S TAKE WHAT'S OURS.
author: TJ | R4

title: Frankie
description:
🔥 CITY FALLS in 50 minutes—stay locked in, survivors.

⚔️ Then we HUNT FRANKIE and rake in those rewards before anyone else does.

🎯 R3/R4/R5 only—fill those rallies NOW and secure the win.

☠️ Let's show the wasteland what we're made of. MOVE.
author: TJ | R4

title: Frankie
description:
🎯 Frankie hits in 49 MINUTES — this is our window.

🏆 Fill those R3/R4/R5 rallies NOW and lock in maximum rewards.

⚔️ Speed wins. Alliance family, get your troops marching.
author: TJ | R4

title: Territory War
description:
🔥 City Capture BEGINS in 43 minutes — get online NOW.

🚛 Prestage your trucks immediately, they need 11 minutes to roll out.

⚔️ This is our moment — let's DOMINATE.
author: TJ | R4

title: City Cap
description:
🎯 City Cap launches in 27 MINUTES — lock in, lock down, dominate.

⚔️ This is our moment to seize wasteland territory and prove what this alliance can do.

🔥 GET READY NOW.
author: TJ | R4

title: Frankie
description:
☠️ FRANKIE DROPS at 1800 GT — be ready, survivors.

🦸 R3, R4, R5: lead with your BEST lineups. No compromises.

💪 Everyone else: fill these rallies with your strongest troops — quality matters.

🏗️ Upgrade that Alliance Plaza NOW if you haven't already — more troops = more firepower = more points.

🎯 Stick to the plan, family. We execute flawlessly and we WIN.

LET'S DOMINATE THE WASTELAND — MOVE OUT!
author: TJ | R4

title: Frankie Reminders
description:
🔥 FRANKIE DROPS AT 1800 — lock it in, warriors, this is NON-NEGOTIABLE.

⚔️ R3, R4, R5 — you own rally starts. Everyone else, bring your BEST trucks and FILL these rallies like your survival depends on it.

🏗️ Alliance Plaza upgrades = bigger rallies = more devastation. Level it up NOW if you haven't already.

💪 Discipline wins wars. Follow the system, maximize our points, dominate the wasteland TOGETHER.
author: TJ | R4

title: Discord Suggestions
description:
💬 Got an idea to make our Discord BETTER? Drop it here — we're listening and evaluating every suggestion.

🎯 Your voice shapes how we survive together, so don't hold back.

☠️ Let's build a wasteland command center worthy of this alliance.
author: TJ | R4

title: I love you
description:
☠️ We are FAMILY out here in the wasteland — bound by sweat, strategy and survival.

❤️ That's what this alliance means: we've got each other's backs when it matters most.

🤝 Every raid, every defense, every resource shared — that's love in action.

🏆 Together we're unstoppable. Let's keep proving it. MOVE OUT.
author: TJ
